summary: Phase 9 testing complete. Tested WebSocket bid stream, Campaign Wizard, and SSP bid endpoint. Found and fixed a bug in Campaign Wizard where it sent creative_ids instead of creative_id.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Wizard was sending creative_ids (array) instead of creative_id (string) expected by API
integration_issues.fix_applied: Modified CampaignWizard.jsx to extract first creative_id from creative_ids array

seed_data_creation: Test campaigns created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket uses wss://.../api/ws/bid-stream. Campaign Wizard has 5 steps and now correctly sends creative_id. SSP bid endpoint uses token '2a9659e425f8433e' for testing with device type 4 (mobile).

websocket_bid_stream.connected_status: PASS - Shows 'Connected' badge when WebSocket is active
websocket_bid_stream.live_bid_activity: PASS - Table shows real-time bid updates
websocket_bid_stream.stats_cards: PASS - Total Requests, Bids Made, No Bids, Bid Rate cards visible

campaign_wizard.5_step_form: PASS - Steps: Basic Info, Targeting, Creatives, Advanced, Review
campaign_wizard.step_1_basic_info: PASS - Campaign Name, Start Date, End Date, Bid Price, Daily Budget fields present
campaign_wizard.step_2_targeting: PASS - Country selection (USA, CAN, GBR, etc.), Device Types (Mobile, PC, Phone, etc.), Operating Systems
campaign_wizard.step_3_creatives: PASS - Creative selection from available creatives
campaign_wizard.step_4_advanced: PASS - Frequency Capping, Bid Shading, ML Prediction options
campaign_wizard.step_5_review: PASS - Summary display with Save as Draft and Launch Campaign buttons
campaign_wizard.campaign_creation: PASS - Campaign successfully created after fix

campaigns_page_wizard_button.wizard_button: PASS - Wizard button with data-testid='wizard-btn' present
campaigns_page_wizard_button.navigation: PASS - Clicking Wizard button navigates to /campaigns/wizard

ssp_bid_endpoint.mobile_device_bid: PASS - Returns 200/204 for mobile device type 4

bug_fixed.root_cause: Wizard was sending creative_ids (array) but backend expected creative_id (string)
bug_fixed.fix: Added logic to extract first creative_id from creative_ids array and added validation to require at least one creative
